description: Registry of code metrics tools: patch-level (run on patch or reconstructed files) and project-level (future: run on repo path + commit). All are optional.

git.name: Git
git.install: Bundled in tools/git/ or system PATH.

cloc.name: CLOC
cloc.install: Bundled in tools/cloc/ or system PATH.

diffstat.name: diffstat
diffstat.purpose: Insertions/deletions summary from patch (optional; we have equivalent from Git).
diffstat.install: Bundled in tools/diffstat/ or system PATH. Windows: GnuWin32 diffstat or WSL.

pygount.name: Pygount
pygount.purpose: LOC by language (Python alternative to CLOC).

radon.name: Radon
radon.purpose: Cyclomatic complexity & maintainability (Python files in patch).

detekt.name: Detekt
detekt.install: Gradle plugin or standalone JAR. Place in tools/detekt/.
detekt.input: Project root or list of Kotlin files

ktlint.name: ktlint
ktlint.install: Gradle plugin or standalone. Place in tools/ktlint/ or PATH.

pmd.name: PMD
pmd.install: JAR in tools/pmd/. Supports Kotlin with plugin.

semgrep.name: Semgrep
semgrep.install: pip install semgrep or standalone binary.
